attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ST_ERLD.ACTION_CODE,
 ST_ERLD.ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CODE,
 ST_ERLD.AMOUNT,
 ST_ERLD.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
 ST_ERLD.ATTRIBUTE1,
 ST_ERLD.ATTRIBUTE2,
 ST_ERLD.ATTRIBUTE3,
 ST_ERLD.CATEGORY_CODE,
 ST_ERLD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 ST_ERLD.CREATION_DATE,
 ST_ERLD.CURRENCY_CODE,
 ST_ERLD.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER,
 ST_ERLD.EXCHANGE_DATE,
 ST_ERLD.EXCHANGE_RATE,
 ST_ERLD.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
 ST_ERLD.GLOBAL_NAME,
 ST_ERLD.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
 ST_ERLD.JUSTIFICATION,
 ST_ERLD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 ST_ERLD.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
 ST_ERLD.MERCHANT_NAME,
 ST_ERLD.NUMBER_ATTENDEES,
 ST_ERLD.ORG_ID,
 ST_ERLD.POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,
 ST_ERLD.RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RATE,
 ST_ERLD.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,
 ST_ERLD.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,
 ST_ERLD.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
 ST_ERLD.RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,
 ST_ERLD.REPORT_HEADER_ID,
 ST_ERLD.REPORT_LINE_ID,
 ST_ERLD.START_EXPENSE_DATE,
 ST_ERLD.TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
 ST_ERLD.VAT_CODE,
 ST_ERLD.WEB_PARAMETER_ID 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS_DELS ST_ERLD WHERE (ST_ERLD.REPORT_LINE_ID,ST_ERLD.GLOBAL_NAME) 
NOT IN (SELECT EL_ERLD.REPORT_LINE_ID,EL_ERLD.GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS_DELS EL_ERLD)
